opinion.h4: IN RE RETENELLER. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA, EASTERN DISTRICT. No. 546. Decided December 9, 1957.
opinion.p: David Berger filed a motion for the City of Philadelphia to dismiss the appeal.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: WALSH v. FIRST NATIONAL BANK & TRUST CO. OF SCRANTON, (1957)
opinion.p: WALSH v. FIRST NATIONAL BANK & TRUST CO. OF SCRANTON, PA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA, EASTERN DISTRICT. No. 553. Decided December 9, 1957.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
